title: soldanella carpatica var. parvifolia
intro: Soldanella carpatica var. parvifolia, also known as Soldanella or alpine forget-me-not, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Soldanella carpatica var. parvifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
